name: @lightfastai/dev-cli
description: Thin CLI harness for Lightfast local development APIs.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-core build && pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-proxy build && pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-services build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.prepack: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build
scripts.pack:check: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build && node scripts/check-pack.mjs
scripts.release:check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run pack:check
scripts.test: pnpm run build && rm -rf .turbo/test-dist && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .turbo/test-dist/test/*.test.js
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-core build && pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-proxy build && pnpm --filter @lightfastai/dev-services build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
